onboarding.slide1_body: Submit child abuse reports anonymously. Your identity is never stored.
onboarding.slide2_body: Use your unique case code to check the status of your report at any time.
onboarding.slide3_body: Instantly alert a nearby child protection officer in a crisis.
onboarding.slide4_body: Earn badges as you learn how to identify and prevent child abuse.
onboarding.already_have_account: Already have an account? Sign in

home.subtitle: Together we protect children
home.offline_banner: You are offline. Reports will be saved and sent when you reconnect.
home.sync_complete: All reports have been synced successfully.
home.tip_1: Teach children the difference between safe and unsafe touch.
home.tip_2: Encourage children to speak up if they feel unsafe.
home.tip_3: Know the signs of child abuse and neglect.

report.title: Report an Incident
report.subtitle: Your identity is protected. All reports are confidential.
report.anonymous_note: We do NOT save your name or phone number
report.type_label: What type of abuse are you reporting?
report.details_placeholder: Please describe the incident in as much detail as you are comfortable sharing...
report.details_hint: When did it happen? How often? What did you see or hear?
report.location_placeholder: e.g. Accra, Ashanti Region, school name...
report.location_gps_failed: Could not get location. Please type the area.
report.evidence_note: Evidence helps officers respond faster. All files are encrypted.
report.voice_error: Could not capture audio. Please try again.
report.triage_is_child_safe_now: Is the child safe right now?
report.triage_is_immediate_danger: Is the child in immediate danger?
report.triage_has_injuries: Does the child have visible injuries?
report.triage_needs_emergency: This may need emergency response. Do you want to alert an officer now?
report.triage_no: No, the child may not be safe
report.review_subtitle: Please check all details before submitting.
report.review_anonymous_confirm: This report will be submitted anonymously. We will not store any personal information about you.
report.draft_saved: Draft saved. You can finish it later.
report.discard_confirm: Are you sure you want to discard this report? All entered information will be lost.
report.offline_note: You are offline. This report will be submitted automatically when you reconnect.
report.category_required: Please select a type of abuse to continue

submitted.title: Report Submitted
submitted.message: Thank you for speaking up. A child protection officer will review this within 24 hours. You are not alone in this.
submitted.case_code_note: Save this code to track your report. It is the only way to check your case status.
submitted.step1: Your report is sent securely to a child protection officer.
submitted.step2: The officer reviews the case and determines the right response.
submitted.step3: If needed, social workers or police are contacted.
submitted.step4: You can track progress using your case code.

track.title: Track Your Case
track.subtitle: Enter your case code to see the latest update.
track.not_found: No case found with that code. Please check and try again.
track.notes_empty: No updates yet. Check back later.
track.feedback_placeholder: Share any feedback about how your case was handled...
track.anonymous_track_note: Your anonymity is maintained throughout the tracking process.

emergency.title: Emergency Help
emergency.subtitle: Use this only if a child is in immediate danger.
emergency.hold_instruction: Press and hold the button for 3 seconds to send an alert
emergency.alert_sent: Alert sent! An officer has been notified.
emergency.officer_found: An officer has been found and is on their way.
emergency.officer_found_message: Officer {{name}} has been notified and is responding to your location.
emergency.no_officer_available: No officer is currently available in your area. Please call emergency services.
emergency.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel the emergency alert?
emergency.childline_note: Free, 24/7 helpline for children and adults
emergency.location_shared: Your location has been shared with emergency services.
emergency.stay_safe_tip: Stay calm. Move to a safe place if possible. Help is on the way.
emergency.disclaimer: This feature requires an active internet connection to locate nearby officers.

learn.title: Learn to Protect
learn.subtitle: Earn badges as you complete lessons on child protection.
learn.quiz_incorrect: Not quite. The correct answer is: {{answer}}
learn.quiz_fail: You need {{pass_score}}% to pass. Try again!
learn.badge_earned_message: You have earned the "{{badge}}" badge. Keep learning to protect more children!
learn.completion_message: You have completed the {{module}} module. Great work!
learn.all_modules_complete: Amazing! You have completed all learning modules. You are now a ChildGuard Champion!

officer.escalate_confirm: Are you sure you want to escalate this case to a senior officer? This action cannot be undone.
officer.escalated_success: Case has been escalated to a senior officer.
officer.close_case_confirm: Please confirm you want to close this case.

admin.deactivate_confirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate this officer?

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.error_network: Network error. Please check your connection.
common.error_server: Server error. Please try again later.
common.name: Name
common.permissions_camera: Camera permission is needed to attach photos.
common.permissions_microphone: Microphone permission is needed to record audio.
common.permissions_location: Location permission is needed to share your location.
